overview.short: The Kolhapur District of Maharashtra is half a mile towards the east of Panhala fort from which it is separated by a ravine.
overview.description: The Kolhapur District of Maharashtra is half a mile towards the east of Panhala fort from which it is separated by a ravine. The chief defense of the fort is a scarped rock fifteen to twenty-five feet high. In most places the steepness of the rock has been increased by artificial scarping and it has been strengthened by a parapet wall of Kolhapur black stone fourteen feet high. In 1827, under Shahoji I (1821–1837), Pavangad and its neighboring fort Panhala were given over to the British Raj.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Pavangad, Kozhikode
topPlaces.description: Pavangad is a suburb included in Kozhikode corporation in the Kozhikode district of Kerala, India. It is located about 6.5 km north of Calicut on the Calicut-Kannur National Highway 66 (India) and is bounded by the Arabian Sea at the west, Canoli Canal at east and Korapuzha River at the north.

topPlaces.name: Puthiyangadi, Kozhikode
topPlaces.description: Puthiyangadi is a suburb of Kozhikode city between Pavangad, Kozhikode and West Hill, Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: G.U.P.S, Padinhattummuri
topPlaces.description: G.U.P.S, Padinhattummuri or Government Upper Primary School, Padinhattummuri or Kakkodi GUPS is situated at Kizhakkummuri in Kakkodi panchayat. Kakkodi is a panchayat in the outskirts of Kozhikode Corporation.

topPlaces.name: Makkada
topPlaces.description: Makkada is a village in Kakkodi panchayath in Calicut district of Kerala state. The postal pin code is 673611.

topPlaces.name: Kakkodi
topPlaces.description: Kakkodi is a Panchayat in the Kozhikode district of Kerala. The Panchayat borders Kozhikode corporation on one side and the kuruvattur, Chelannur, thalakkulathur and Elathur panchayats on the other sides.

topPlaces.name: Thalakkulathur
topPlaces.description: Thalakkulathur is a small village near Kozhikode city, along the road to Atholi, in the state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: West Hill, Kerala
topPlaces.description: West Hill is a suburb of Kozhikode, Kerala in the peninsular India. The main venue for the Kerala State School Arts festival held in January 2023, Vikram Maidan is situated at West Hill.

topPlaces.name: Elathur, Kozhikode
topPlaces.description: Elathur is a part of Calicut corporation in Kozhikode district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is located about 12 km north of Kozhikode city on the National Highway 66.

items.note: Pavangad is a suburb included in Kozhikode corporation in the Kozhikode district of Kerala, India. It is located about 6.5 km north of Calicut on the Calicut-Kannur National Highway 66 (India) and is bounded by the Arabian Sea at the west, Canoli Canal at east and Korapuzha River at the north.
Puthiyangadi is a suburb of Kozhikode city between Pavangad, Kozhikode and West Hill, Kerala, India.

G.U.P.S, Padinhattummuri or Government Upper Primary School, Padinhattummuri or Kakkodi GUPS is situated at Kizhakkummuri in Kakkodi panchayat. Kakkodi is a panchayat in the outskirts of Kozhikode Corporation.

Thalakkulathur is a small village near Kozhikode city, along the road to Atholi, in the state of Kerala.
West Hill is a suburb of Kozhikode, Kerala in the peninsular India. The main venue for the Kerala State School Arts festival held in January 2023, Vikram Maidan is situated at West Hill.
Elathur is a part of Calicut corporation in Kozhikode district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is located about 12 km north of Kozhikode city on the National Highway 66.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pavangad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pavangad is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (29 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (136 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pavangad?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pavangad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pavangad?
faq.a: Stays in Pavangad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Pavangad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Pavangad, Kozhikode, Puthiyangadi, Kozhikode, G.U.P.S, Padinhattummuri, Makkada, Kakkodi.
